text:
センパイ、今回は地下坑道で頼む。
対象はシグノビート。
緩急をつけて攻撃してくるやつな。

あっという間に距離を詰めてくるし
あの両手の武器による連続斬りもあって
なかなか狙いがつけられなくて……さ。

センパイなら、慌てずに効率良く
仕留めることってできるんだろ？
おれにはまだ難しい……

ってわけで、センパイ。
ジャストアタックでの仕留め方を
見せ

Let's head to the Underground Shafts next,
boss. We're after some Signo Beats this time.
You know, the ones that jet around?

They close in so fast, and since they dual wield
weapons they really hit with a flurry.
Makes it hard to try and line up a shot...

But you probably have no trouble dealing
with them at all, do you boss? I bet you keep
your cool and don't waste a single move.
Unlike me...

So, that's why I was thinking I'd have you
show me how to take them down with a
perfect attack.
